entries.round: task:Perform a comprehensive audit and testing of the current Liquidity Guard Bot (Go + MongoDB). 1. Review the existing test files (*_test.go) and ensure they are compatible with the latest architecture (Revision 3). 2. Create any missing tests for the gRPC API and MongoDB repository layers. 3. Provide a detailed test report in 'reports/test_report_liquidity_guard.md'. 4. If possible, simulate a few trade cycles to verify the 'is_resumed' logic and token saving efficiency.
